etymology.description: Depicts a hand wearing an archer's thumb ring
etymology.interpretation: The character 夬(夬) (guài, "decisive") originally depicts a hand wearing an archer's thumb ring, emphasizing the concept of decisiveness or resolution, as this ring is essential for drawing a bowstring.

examples.chinese: 他的性格很夬(夬)，所以在关键时刻总能做出正确的决定(決策)。
examples.pinyin: Tā de xìnggé hěn guài, suǒyǐ zài guānjiàn shíkè zǒng néng zuò chū zhèngquè de juécè.
examples.english: He has a decisive personality, so he can always make the right decisions at critical moments.

examples.chinese: 在处理危机时(危機時)，她总是显得异常夬(夬)，从未退缩(退縮)。
examples.pinyin: Zài chǔlǐ wēijī shí, tā zǒng shì xiǎndé yìcháng guài, cóngwèi tuìsuō.
examples.english: When dealing with crises, she always appears exceptionally decisive and never retreats.
